topoImageList.noLineAssignedToTopoImage: No line has been assigned to this image so far.
topoImageForm.addTopoImageDescription: Upload a new Topo image. Afterwards, available lines can be drawn on the image. The wall face should take up most of the picture and the whole line should be easy to see. In some cases, it makes sense to draw the same line on multiple images. This is the case, for example, with traverses or lines that run around an arête.
topoImageForm.editTopoImageDescription: Meta details of the image can be edited. Unfortunately, the image itself can no longer be changed, otherwise drawn lines will no longer be correct.
topoImageForm.topoImageDescriptionPlaceh: Information about the block. Does it stay wet for a long time, for example? Does it have a special history? Are there loose rocks?
batchUploadForm.batchImageUploadDescript: Upload several topo images at the same time and create lines and their paths with basic information right away. If you want to add details to the lines later, you can do so by editing them individually.
batchUploadForm.dateInFutureValidationEr: The date of the first ascent cannot be in the future
batchUploadForm.displayUserGradesActive: Attention: The grades proposed in the ascents determine the displayed grade
